reviews.review_description:
It's like a very chill driving fetch-quest game but set in a nostalgic 90s rave scene reimagining of the UK. The humour is great, and I love the music that's here. My only slight gripe is that there doesn't seem to be a vignette option. Also please add vehicles on the road to add a bit more challenge 🎮☺️🏎️🏎️

I kinda like that you can't tear it around corners in this, you have to drive like a sensible chap. This is something we needed on Quest, and it's cheap too! Support VR, buy this game

Update: I have been playing this for ages now and I still can't stop playing ... This is a chill must buy

Quite fun with a unique visual style. Dialogue and world are interesting and for the price, it's a great little game to get if you feel like having a relaxing driving game where you take the wheel to make deliveries before Amazon removed all the fun from it.

reviews.review_title: A driving game that isn't racing
reviews.review_description: I love the chill vibes and the music. I can finally drive around without beating a time or crossing a finish line. A neat game with plenty of character!

reviews.review_title: Good driving mechanics and trippy visual
reviews.review_description:
...But, I can't figure out how to return to the garage. is the button broken?

Also there's a visual glitch. on the far right of my field of view, there's a small vertical stripe that is just lacking textures. a bit distracting.

developer_response.body: Hey Henrik! Thanks for playing our game. To return to the main menu, grab the tablet using the grip button. You should see an orange hand cursor. You can move this cursor using the right joystick. Select "Back to Garage" using the A button, then "Yes Please" using the right stick and A. You will return to the main menu this way. As far as the bug, we're actively looking into this issue that affected some folks and have potentially identified the source. Hope to find a solution in the near future!

reviews.review_title: Huge amount of fun for the price
reviews.review_description: I love this game and it's an absolute steal at it's current price.  Great visuals and soundtrack and it really captures driving around 1980's Britain.
So ok I liked this game before release and I was happy to get it right now but can u make it realistic to add that u can start the car by key and add gas station pls and thank u👍￼
Why would you make a driving game where you can only hold the wheel with one hand?

developer_response.body: Hey Dan! Thanks for playing our game. Sorry to hear about the headaches. We recommend taking breaks in between gaming sessions. Our design for the game centres around being casual, and flexibility. We felt that having both hands on the steering wheel was difficult to replicate that with the issues of hands crossing over and the steering wheel not resetting for convenience. So we opted for more control options, including the ability to steer with the stick. Hope you can give the game another go with these things considered!
